trait.name: Augmented Reflex Suite
entries: Varn has advantage on Dexterity saving throws against effects that target only her.

trait.name: Integrated Conduit Core
entries: Once on each of her turns when Varn hits with a melee attack, she deals an extra 11 ({@damage 2d10}) lightning or force damage.

trait.name: Phase Step
entries: As a bonus action, Varn teleports up to 20 feet to an unoccupied space she can see. Until the start of her next turn, attack rolls against her are made with disadvantage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Varn makes two Surge Claw attacks.

action.name: Surge Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) slashing damage plus 11 ({@damage 2d10}) lightning or force damage.

action.name: Force Pulse Strike
entries: Each creature in a 15-foot cone originating from Varn must make a DC 16 Strength saving throw, taking 13 ({@damage 3d8}) force damage and falling prone on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

action.name: Neural Override Pulse (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Each creature of Varn's choice within 20 feet must succeed on a DC 16 Intelligence saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn. Constructs and implanted creatures make this save with disadvantage.
